hero.tagline: We design. We manufacture. We install.
hero.subtitle: We design, manufacture and install ALU and PVC joinery, pergolas, fences and steel structures — with modern CNC technology and European standards.

why.title: Why Tehnoplast?
why.subtitle: Precise. Reliable. Quality. — the principle we have worked by for more than two and a half decades.

items.title: In-house production
items.text: Full quality control from raw material to finished product.

items.title: Custom design
items.text: 3D design and technical solutions tailored to your needs.

items.title: Top-tier equipment
items.text: Modern CNC machines and fiber laser technology.

items.title: Professional installation
items.text: Fast, safe and expert installation on site.

items.title: Quality guarantee
items.text: European quality standards in every detail.

items.title: Fast support
items.text: We are here for you — before, during and after installation.

process.title: From idea to finished product
process.subtitle: From first contact to installation — a clear process under one roof, with no subcontractors.

steps.title: Idea & concept
steps.text: We listen to your needs and define the concept, materials and direction of the solution together.

steps.title: 3D design
steps.text: We build a precise 3D model and technical documentation before any production.

steps.title: CNC preparation
steps.text: We program the machines and prepare the material for precise cutting and machining.

steps.title: Welding
steps.text: We join the elements to the highest standards, with control of every weld.

steps.title: Protection & painting
steps.text: We powder-coat and protect the surfaces for durability and a flawless finish.

steps.title: Transport & installation
steps.text: We deliver safely and install expertly at your location, on time.

references.title: Projects completed across Serbia and Europe
references.subtitle: More than 5000 successfully completed projects — from private homes to industrial complexes.

ctaBanner.title: From idea to finished product.
ctaBanner.subtitle: Contact us today for a free consultation.

Home.mainTitle: Complete solution for the production and installation of PVC & ALU joinery
Home.mainSubtitle: Tehnoplast specializes in the design, production and installation of PVC and ALU joinery, providing quality solutions for homes and businesses across Europe.
Home.subheading2: Our products feature in load-bearing structures and all types of fences, in both the industrial and private sectors.

stats.text: A skilled team dedicated to innovation and outstanding results on every project.
Three decades of expertise, dedication and success in the industry.
Thousands of successfully completed projects, delivered with dedication and precision.
Every client is our priority — trust, quality and long-term cooperation.

Home.subheading3: We shape spaces across Europe, combining modern design, top-quality craftsmanship and premium materials. Our projects in Germany, France and Serbia reflect a commitment to detail, functionality and innovation, delivering solutions tailored to each client's specific needs.

proces.description: Our approach optimizes communication, adapts to your business needs and aligns with your brand. By creating functional, aesthetically coherent solutions, we help you connect better with clients, increase productivity and strengthen your market presence.

proces.description: Our production process guarantees durability, functionality and aesthetics, tailored to specific client requirements. We use quality materials and modern processing methods to deliver joinery that meets the highest standards.

PvcAlu.title: PVC & ALU Joinery
PvcAlu.subtitle: The warmth of home and energy efficiency in every detail. From high-insulation PVC systems to aluminium profiles for large glazed areas — a complete program of windows, doors and sliding systems, made in our own production.

PergoleStakleni.title: Pergolas & Glass Systems
PergoleStakleni.subtitle: Perfect comfort and protection in every season. Bioclimatic and textile pergolas, sliding glass systems and ZIP screen solutions — for terraces, gardens and outdoor spaces used all year round.

Cnc.title: CNC Machining & Steel Structures
Cnc.subtitle: The most impressive part of our production: fiber laser, laser welding, CNC bending and steel structures. Where precision is measured in tenths of a millimetre and strength in tonnes.
Cnc.processSubtitle: Six steps, all under one roof — from the first drawing to on-site installation.

features: Perfect edge with no extra finishing
